overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the vibrant streets of Night City, featuring teal-colored residential buildings, futuristic infrastructure, and a medical facility. The character navigates through intersections, covered walkways, and approaches a MedCenter in a dense cyberpunk urban environment with bright morning sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with teal residential buildings

events.description: character begins crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk
futuristic black car drives past the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking through a busy street corner and crossing the road alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: large olive green military-style truck parked at the intersection
pedestrian with red arm bands and visible cybernetic implants walking ahead

entered.detail: multi-story teal colored residential building with external air conditioning units and balconies
prominent yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing with red text markings
yellow illuminated sign for El Dorado pawn shop on building facade
small trees planted along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vibrant street corner in a cyberpunk district with distinctive teal-colored apartment buildings. The character walks forward across a yellow-striped crosswalk, passing a parked military truck and following a pedestrian with cybernetic implants. The morning sun casts sharp shadows across the asphalt as a futuristic car drives through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with futuristic high-rise towers

events.description: character stops walking and looks up at the towering blue residential building
view shifts to reveal outdoor escalator and massive industrial ventilation fans on building exterior

agents.ego_description: pausing in the intersection to look up at the surrounding architecture and turning to explore the area

entered.detail: tall cylindrical blue apartment building with external scaffolding and construction elements
metal escalator structure attached to building facade leading upward
massive circular industrial cooling fans mounted on building exterior
street surface covered with colorful teal and pink graffiti art

segments.scene_description: The character explores an open intersection surrounded by towering futuristic architecture, looking up at a prominent blue cylindrical residential tower. The camera pans to reveal an outdoor escalator and massive industrial ventilation fans on a nearby building. The street features vibrant graffiti art covering the pavement while the morning sun illuminates the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway

events.description: character enters covered walkway beneath the massive concrete overpass
passing under the overpass creates dappled shadow patterns on the green walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated roadway, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a yellow bench using a handheld device

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure casting shadows over the walkway
large digital billboard displaying Nicola soda advertisement with blue neon accents
painted green walkway surface with benches and planters under the overpass
bright yellow seating benches along the walkway wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive concrete overpass into a semi-covered pedestrian walkway with a distinctive green painted path. The area features yellow benches where people sit, large digital advertisement screens for Nicola soda, and dappled sunlight filtering through the elevated highway structure above.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching medical facility with palm trees

events.description: exiting the covered walkway back into open sunlight near the MedCenter
crossing the street toward the MedCenter building entrance area

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the sidewalk toward the medical facility with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black car driving along the street past the crosswalk

entered.detail: large white medical facility with red cross signage and MedCenter text
tall palm trees lining the street near the medical facility
yellow and black striped construction barriers blocking part of the road

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the character crosses a sunlit street toward a large white MedCenter building marked with red crosses. Palm trees line the sidewalk and construction barriers block part of the roadway. The character navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic while a black car drives past the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: ramp leading up to MedCenter entrance

events.description: character begins ascending the inclined ramp toward the MedCenter entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined ramp toward the MedCenter entrance alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians waiting near the MedCenter entrance ramp

entered.detail: sloped concrete walkway leading up to the medical facility entrance with green surface
futuristic enclosed pedestrian bridge connecting to adjacent buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character ascending a sloped ramp leading up to the MedCenter entrance. The white medical facility looms larger as the character approaches, with an elevated walkway bridge visible to the left. Other pedestrians are seen waiting and walking near the entrance as the character continues up the incline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant cyberpunk district that transitions from open, sun-drenched intersections into a sheltered urban corridor before arriving at a medical facility. It begins at a street corner with teal-colored apartment buildings, moving across a yellow-striped crosswalk past a military truck as the morning sun casts sharp shadows. As the character enters a wide intersection, the view expands to reveal towering blue residential cylinders and industrial ventilation fans before shifting beneath a massive concrete overpass. The scene then moves through a semi-covered pedestrian walkway with green paths and digital soda advertisements, where dappled sunlight filters through the highway structure above. Finally, the camera emerges back into the bright light to cross a street lined with palm trees, ascending a sloped ramp toward the entrance of a large white MedCenter.
